title: begonia obsolescens
intro: Begonia obsolescens, also known as Begonia, is a type of flowering plant species within the family Begoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Begonia obsolescens can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
